summary: Comprehensive testing of FABVERSE ERP UI/UX overhaul completed. All backend APIs pass (100%). Frontend UI testing shows complete functionality with navy blue sidebar, stats cards, table/kanban views, challans with proper type filtering, and challan detail views (both Stitching and Washing) working correctly.

issues: Stats cards data filtering by search doesn't update card counts dynamically (shows filtered counts only in Kanban view columns)

passed_tests: Login page with navy blue theme and FABVERSE branding
Dashboard page with 5 stats cards (Total Lots, Cutting, Stitching/Bartack, Washing, Completed)
Lots page delete functionality with confirmation dialog
Lots page search and filter functionality
Challans page type filter (All Types, Stitching, Washing)
Stitching Challan detail view with all sections
Washing Challan detail view with Bartack Done By section
Print Challan button present on challan views
Change Password page with all form fields
Sidebar navigation with all menu items (Dashboard, Lots, Challans, Reports, Import/Export, Change Password)
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for automated testing
Proper error handling in API responses
Toast notifications working for success/error states
seed_data_creation: Test lots and challans (TEST-69630, ST-001, W-001) were present and tested. Additional test lots were created during testing and cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested UI/UX features have been implemented and tested: 1) Navy blue sidebar with proper navigation items, 2) Light blue background, 3) Stats cards on dashboard with icons, 4) Search and filter functionality, 5) Table/Kanban toggle, 6) Separate Lots page with delete functionality, 7) Separate Challans page with type filter, 8) Redesigned Stitching and Washing challan views with Bartack Done By section on washing challans.
